tracks.meaning: a fixed standard quantity used for measuring or evaluating something
a single soldier or the smallest organized group in an armed force
a distinct department, division, or operational section within an organization
a single apartment or living space in a building with multiple dwellings
a self-contained course or module of instruction within a larger program of study
a single dose or administration of treatment given to one patient
a single indivisible element or component of a larger system
to combine separate things into one coherent or integrated whole
the smallest meaningful element or component in a psychological analysis or framework
a single piece of scenery, costume, or property used in a production
a single product or item produced in a batch or production run
a single share of stock or a discrete financial investment instrument
a single provision, clause, or distinct element within a legal document or statute
a person regarded as a single individual or distinct entity in a group
